product: Regenerative farm-to-door food delivery + equity crowdfunding campaign

scoring_context.product: FarmThru — online regenerative farm-to-door food delivery (50+ farms, Sydney/Central Coast/Wollongong). Currently running pre-launch equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal (July 2026 launch). VIP waitlist with $5 refundable deposit.
scoring_context.audience: Sydney households who care about food quality, provenance, and ethics. Mix of: (1) Food-conscious parents who want better for their families, (2) Values-driven consumers who support regenerative agriculture, (3) Sophisticated retail investors evaluating equity crowdfunding opportunities. Skews female, 30-55, higher income, inner-west/northern beaches/eastern suburbs.
key_motivations: Trust & transparency — knowing exactly where food comes from and who grew it
Quality over convenience — days old, not weeks old; taste the difference
Values alignment — supporting regenerative agriculture and fair farmer compensation
Community — being part of a local food movement, not just another customer
Investment opportunity — owning a piece of a growing business they already believe in
scoring_context.brand_values: Honest, founder-voice, regenerative, anti-middleman. Never greenwash. Acknowledge what we don't know. Radical transparency about risk. The food is the hero, not the investment returns.
scoring_context.campaign_context: Pre-launch equity crowdfunding via Birchal. This is NOT a product purchase funnel — it's an investment campaign. All content must comply with ASIC RG 234 (balanced disclosure, no return projections, risk acknowledgment). The conversion funnel is: awareness → waitlist signup → VIP deposit ($5 refundable) → actual investment ($50-$10K) when campaign goes live.
scoring_context.success_looks_like: Reader understands what FarmThru is, feels aligned with the mission, trusts the founders, and joins the waitlist or makes a VIP deposit. For investment content: reader feels informed (not sold to), understands both opportunity and risk, and is motivated to invest when the campaign opens.

receptionist_test_questions: Where does the food come from?
How is this different from the supermarket?
How do I invest / join the waitlist?
